tab_descs.mcp: MCP servers expose external tools to the agent via the Model Context Protocol. The agent registers discovered tools as concrete aliases like mcp.<server>.<tool> and calls them directly.

general.not_persisted: Language setting is not persisted yet
general.download_dir_placeholder: Click the button on the right to select...
general.download_dir_desc: Each project creates its own folder under this root and automatically stores the project canvas file (.mpcanvas) together with the source images, videos, 3D assets, and other raw resources used on that canvas.

environment.comfy_mode_info_desc:
Using remote ComfyUI mode means that Magic Pot only calls the API of ComfyUI through HTTP requests, without managing the startup and shutdown of ComfyUI.
Using local ComfyUI mode can manage the startup and shutdown of ComfyUI, but requires Magic Pot and ComfyUI to be on the same device.
environment.models_relative_tip: If a relative path is provided, it is relative to the ComfyUI folder
environment.placeholder_rel_or_abs: Absolute path or relative to the ComfyUI folder
environment.placeholder_remote_comfyui_mapping_dir: If the remote ComfyUI directory is mapped to the local, you can fill in the absolute path
environment.err_load_extra_yaml_desc:
Please check whether extra_model_paths.yaml exists under the ComfyUI folder.

Once the file exists, the configuration in the `a111` field will be read automatically.
environment.err_pure_need_python: Python command is required for the Lite mode
environment.err_pure_need_comfy: ComfyUI path is required for the Lite mode

data_directory.load_failed: Failed to load the data directory state.
data_directory.unavailable: No data directory information is available.
data_directory.info: The data directory stores local config, QApps, skills, checks, chat workspaces, and other runtime data. Only empty directories or existing Magic Pot data directories are allowed to avoid mixing unrelated files into app data.
data_directory.env_override: The current directory is forced by the `MAGICPOT_USER_DATA_DIR` environment variable. Remove that environment variable before changing it here.
data_directory.restart_hint: The app restarts after you switch directories. If the target directory is empty, the next launch migrates the current data. If the target already contains Magic Pot data, the app switches directly to it.
data_directory.update_failed: Failed to update the data directory.
data_directory.dialog_message: This change requires an app restart.

llm.proxy_mode_desc: Magic Pot is AIEngine's built-in LLM proxy feature. You can use one computer with API access as a server, and other computers as clients to connect.
llm.use_remote_llm_tooltip: When enabled, will connect to remote AIEngine server first
llm.remote_server_access_token_placeholder: Optional. Match the server access token if configured.
llm.enable_llm_server_tooltip: When enabled, other AIEngine clients can connect to this machine through this port
llm.llm_server_access_token_placeholder: Optional. Require clients to send this token.
llm.login_failed: Failed to open login window, please try again
llm.quickapp_api_hint_title: Quick App API lives in the plugin tab
llm.quickapp_api_hint: Quick Apps, prompt assistance, image interrogation, and Hunyuan3D now use the separate Quick App API settings.
llm.is_vision_model_tooltip: The LLM model is required to be visually capable when using a prophylactic rebuttal. If it is not clear whether or not it is supported please check the model document.
llm.image_interrogation_prompt_placeholder: Prompt used when interrogating image prompts
llm.random_prompt_info_line1: Once enabled, you can use the following Prompt to generate random prompts.
llm.random_prompt_info_line3: What the generated prompt is used to describe, defined in the Prompt component of QApp. If no description is defined in QApp, the default description is used: `Generate an image`.
llm.translation_info_line1: Once enabled, you can use the following Prompt to translate prompts.
llm.translation_info_line3: {{ prompt }} represents the non-English prompt entered.
llm.interrogation_info_line1: Once enabled, you can use the following Prompt to interrogate image prompts.
llm.interrogation_info_line2: Users can upload images and then use the following Prompt to call LLM to interrogate prompts.
llm.interrogation_info_line3: At least one vision model needs to be configured in the LLM Profile.
llm.select_profile: Select model (leave empty to use the default)

quickapp_api.section_info: Quick App execution, Quick App prompt assistance, and Hunyuan3D use only the "Quick App API" profiles configured here.
quickapp_api.split_notice: Agent API profiles are not reused for Quick Apps anymore. Add at least one Quick App API profile here if you want Quick Apps, prompt translation, image interrogation, or Hunyuan3D to run.
quickapp_api.image_interrogation_prompt_placeholder: Prompt used when interrogating Quick App images
quickapp_api.select_profile: Select model (leave empty to use the default)
quickapp_api.translation_info_line1: Once enabled, Quick App prompt translation will prefer the configuration here.
quickapp_api.translation_info_line3: {{ prompt }} represents the non-English prompt entered.
quickapp_api.interrogation_info_line1: Once enabled, Quick App image interrogation will prefer the configuration here.
quickapp_api.interrogation_info_line3: At least one vision model needs to be configured.
quickapp_api.hunyuan_info: Choose Hunyuan3D from the Quick Apps panel on the right. The Tencent Cloud credentials configured here are used to turn the uploaded reference image into a 3D model.
quickapp_api.hunyuan_profile_credentials_info: Tencent SecretId/SecretKey are used for Hunyuan3D jobs and COS uploads. The Hunyuan3D API Key is optional and only used by supported API flows.
quickapp_api.api_region_hint: When left empty, MagicPot uses ap-guangzhou.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_hint: The clear action removes objects only under the current prefix, not the entire bucket.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_requirements: SecretId, SecretKey, COS bucket, and COS region are required before clearing.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_dialog_message: This will delete all objects under the current Hunyuan3D prefix and cannot be undone.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_empty: No objects were found under the current prefix.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_partial: Deleted {{deletedCount}} objects, but {{errorCount}} objects failed to delete.
quickapp_api.clear_cos_failed: Failed to clear the Hunyuan3D COS cache.

mcp.overview_body: Manage external MCP servers here so MagicPot can discover tools through the existing chat runtime. You can also control MagicPot's own MCP endpoint for external clients.
mcp.client_info: Each server becomes available inside MagicPot as MCP-backed tools. Use stdio for local commands and streamable-http for remote MCP endpoints.
mcp.client_empty: No external MCP servers are configured yet. Add one server card to start exposing tools inside MagicPot.
mcp.runtime_status_failed: MagicPot could not load the current MCP runtime status.
mcp.tool_prefix_placeholder: Optional. Leave empty to keep the server tool names.
mcp.cwd_placeholder: Optional. Override the process working directory.
mcp.env_placeholder:
One KEY=VALUE pair per line. Example:
GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_xxx
mcp.headers_placeholder:
One KEY=VALUE pair per line. Example:
Authorization=Bearer token
mcp.server_info: When enabled, external MCP-compatible clients can connect to MagicPot through this local endpoint.
mcp.auth_token_placeholder: Optional. Require Bearer authentication for external callers.

about.warranty_text: This program is provided AS IS, without warranty of any kind.

terminal.title_ready: Terminal is ready. Run a command to start...
terminal.port_warning_suffix: . Please stop the ComfyUI server or free the port.

workspace.title: Quick Apps
workspace.subtitle: Image and 3D quick apps
workspace.hunyuan_hint: Select Hunyuan3D from the right-side Quick Apps list. Its Tencent Cloud credentials are configured in Settings > Quick App API.

design.wan_video_desc: Open the shipped Wan2_2_T2V, Wan2_2_I2V, and GenericVideoBoundaryFrames templates directly.
design.video_qapp_desc: Shipped Wan 2.2 templates and the generic video workflow are surfaced separately so text-to-video, image-to-video, and frame-based pipelines are easier to tell apart.
design.err_invalid_workflow:
The loaded workflow is not a valid workflow
Please go to ComfyUI and export the workflow as a JSON file via API, then load that JSON file
design.output_node_info: If output nodes are specified, only specified nodes will be output, and other nodes will not be output.

save.title: QApp Name
save.label: QApp Name
save.error_config: Please configure QApp and workflow first
save.info_line1: Use `/` as separator to save QApp to subfolders.
save.info_line2: You can also adjust the location manually after saving by opening the QApp directory.

design.err_no_qapp_dir: Quick App directory is not set
design.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this Quick App? This action cannot be undone.

callout.not_installed_desc: The following nodes are not installed:
callout.not_installed_custom_node_urls: Install custom nodes from the following links:
callout.node_exists_restart: Node folder already exists. Restart ComfyUI and try again.
callout.node_installed_restart: Node installed. Restart ComfyUI to enable it.
callout.preflight_failed: Preflight failed: missing {{items}}. Download or install the dependencies above, then run again.
callout.comfy_api_not_available_desc_design: Please connect to ComfyUI for a better design experience
callout.comfy_api_not_available_desc_execute: Please connect to ComfyUI to use normally

comfy_org_api.alert: This Quick App contains ComfyUI API nodes. Enter a Comfy API Key before running it.
comfy_org_api.label: Comfy API Key
comfy_org_api.helper: The key is submitted to ComfyUI as extra_data.api_key_comfy_org.
comfy_org_api.validation_required: Please enter a Comfy API Key first

errors.missing_profile_with_vision: Please configure an API profile. Prompt interrogation requires a vision-capable model.
errors.missing_profile: Please configure an API profile first.
errors.max_length: Prompt length must not exceed {{maxLength}} characters.

chat.skill_prompt_bound: The bound skill prompt will be sent automatically with your message.
chat.agent_skill_active_desc: The model selector is hidden and messages go directly to the selected Agent skill.
chat.input_placeholder: Type a message... (Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.go_to_settings: Please configure API in Settings before using the chat feature.
chat.paste_image_hint: You can paste images from clipboard (Ctrl+V)
chat.speech_recognition_error: Speech recognition error, please check microphone permissions
chat.speech_recognition_not_supported: Your browser does not support speech recognition
chat.send_to_photoshop_failed: Failed to send to current Photoshop document: {{error}}
chat.sent_to_figma_svg: Copied selection SVG to clipboard for Figma
chat.preview_controls: {{scale}}% | Scroll to switch | Ctrl+wheel to zoom | Drag to pan | Double-click or Esc to close

custom_app.custom_node_urls_info: If custom node URLs are enabled, users will be prompted to install custom nodes if any nodes are not found.

custom_workshop.title: Custom Workshop
custom_workshop.subtitle: Switch between Custom Apps and Custom Skills here. Both surfaces are available now.
custom_workshop.open_custom_app_desc: Build or edit Quick App workflows with the existing designer.
custom_workshop.custom_skill_desc: Manage categories, prompts, and Agent skills here.
custom_workshop.custom_skill_catalog_desc: Read-only catalog entries derived from persisted custom skills.
custom_workshop.custom_skill_catalog_empty: No custom skills are available yet.
custom_workshop.skill_summary_desc: Track how many skills are ready, how many need attention, and which categories already exist.
custom_workshop.attention_desc: {{count}} skill(s) still need fixes before they are ready to use.
custom_workshop.attention_clear: All skills are ready to use.
custom_workshop.delete_category_confirm_desc: Delete category "{{name}}" and all skills under it? This action cannot be undone.
custom_workshop.delete_skill_confirm_desc: Delete skill "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
custom_workshop.create_skill_desc: Choose an existing category or create a new one first, then fill in the skill name and prompt. After confirming, the skill can be picked in Agent.
custom_workshop.create_skill_agent_hint: Agent skills automatically open a new conversation in Agent, hide MagicPot's built-in model selector, and send messages directly to the configured API address.
custom_workshop.skill_categories_desc: Choose a category first, then manage the skills inside it.
custom_workshop.skill_category_empty_desc: Create a category first, then add skills into it.
custom_workshop.skill_name_empty: No skills in this category yet
custom_workshop.skill_name_empty_desc: Add a skill in the current category to start editing its prompt.
custom_workshop.skill_detail_empty: Choose a skill to edit its prompt and type here.
custom_workshop.skill_category_helper: Renaming a category updates every skill under it.
custom_workshop.skill_prompt_helper: When users choose this skill in Agent, this prompt is sent together with their message.
custom_workshop.issue_api_address: Agent skills need an API address
custom_workshop.video_catalog_desc: Shipped video templates are grouped by workflow type so it is easier to jump to Wan 2.2 or the generic video flow.
custom_workshop.error_api_address_required: Agent skills require an API address.
custom_workshop.skill_bound_apps_helper: Click an app to bind or unbind it. Selected apps show their tools and resources below.
custom_workshop.skill_bound_apps_empty: No apps are bound to this skill yet.

canvas.export_shortcut_hint: Click the input box and press the desired key combination
canvas.export_scene_empty: There is no scene content to export
canvas.export_images_empty: There are no elements to export
canvas.export_selected_images_empty: There are no selected elements to export
canvas.group_create_empty: Select canvas items before creating a group
canvas.group_empty_hint: Select items on the canvas, then create a group from the floating action
canvas.group_branch_empty_hint: Click a branch or group to quickly focus it on the canvas.
canvas.group_missing_items: This group no longer has any items on the canvas
canvas.group_missing_items_hint: The grouped items no longer exist. You can delete this group and create it again.
canvas.group_conflict: Some of the selected items already belong to another group.
canvas.pick_color_unsupported: Screen color picking is not supported in the current environment.
canvas.pick_color_failed: Failed to pick a screen color.
canvas.search_hint: Search text nodes, images, videos, and 3D models. Press Ctrl+F to focus.
canvas.confirm_clear_desc: Are you sure you want to clear the canvas? This action cannot be undone.

project_canvas.empty_state_desc: Drag and drop files, images or videos here

image_edit.lighting_tooltip: Open the shipped image/video perspective and lighting workflows
image_edit.multi_angle_tooltip: Open the shipped image-side multi-angle workflow
